title: Attack on Titan GUI Pack
description: Overhauled Minecraft GUI in the theme off Attack on Titan.
body:

# Overview
From the lovable anime/manga Attack on Titan. Enjoy a overhauled GUI Minecraft experience with memorable scouts, titan shifters and the protagonist and antagonist Eren Yeager.

## Recommended Modpack
- [**Shingeki no Kyojin (Attack on Titan)**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/shingeki-no-kyojin)

### Resourcepack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator using this Resourcepack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Resourcepack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Resourcepack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
